terms.definition_en: A board made of insulating material used to mechanically support and electrically connect electronic components.
terms.definition_es: Una placa hecha de material aislante utilizada para soportar mecánicamente y conectar eléctricamente componentes electrónicos.
examples: The motherboard of a computer is a large PCB.
We need to design a new PCB layout for the sensor module.

terms.definition_en: A passive two-terminal electrical component that implements electrical resistance as a circuit element.
terms.definition_es: Un componente eléctrico pasivo de dos terminales que implementa resistencia eléctrica como un elemento del circuito.
examples: Add a 10k ohm resistor to limit the current through the LED.
Resistors are color-coded to indicate their resistance value.

terms.definition_en: The difference in electric potential between two points, which drives electrical current.
terms.definition_es: La diferencia de potencial eléctrico entre dos puntos, que impulsa la corriente eléctrica.
examples: The battery provides a voltage of 9V.
High voltage can be dangerous if not handled properly.

terms.definition_en: A compact integrated circuit designed to govern a specific operation in an embedded system.
terms.definition_es: Un circuito integrado compacto diseñado para gobernar una operación específica en un sistema embebido.
examples: An Arduino board uses a microcontroller to read sensors.
The microcontroller processes the inputs and controls the motors.

terms.definition_en: A type of electronic test instrument that graphically displays varying electrical voltages as a two-dimensional plot.
terms.definition_es: Un tipo de instrumento de prueba electrónico que muestra gráficamente voltajes eléctricos variables como un trazado bidimensional.
examples: Use the oscilloscope to measure the signal frequency.
The oscilloscope showed a noisy waveform on the output.

categories.components: Basic discrete devices or physical entities in an electronic system
categories.theory: Fundamental principles of electricity and electronics
categories.tools: Instruments used for testing and measurement

inference_rules.description: If a user searches for a term, suggest all directly related terms
If a term has difficulty=beginner, prioritize showing it before intermediate ones
If two terms share the same category, they are contextually related
